inputs.label: Dry Bulb Temperature
inputs.businessContext: The temperature of air measured by a thermometer freely exposed to air but shielded from radiation and moisture.

businessContext_i18n.en: The temperature of air measured by a thermometer freely exposed to air but shielded from radiation and moisture.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Radyasyon ve nemden korunmuş, serbest havaya maruz kalan bir termometre ile ölçülen hava sıcaklığı.

inputs.label: Relative Humidity
inputs.businessContext: The ratio of the partial pressure of water vapor to the equilibrium vapor pressure of water at the same temperature.

businessContext_i18n.en: The ratio of the partial pressure of water vapor to the equilibrium vapor pressure of water at the same temperature.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Su buharı kısmi basıncının aynı sıcaklıktaki denge buhar basıncına oranı.

inputs.label: Atmospheric Pressure
inputs.businessContext: The pressure exerted by the weight of the atmosphere at the location (standard sea-level pressure is 1013.25 hPa). Not used in this simplified calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: The pressure exerted by the weight of the atmosphere at the location (standard sea-level pressure is 1013.25 hPa). Not used in this simplified calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Konumdaki atmosferin ağırlığının uyguladığı basınç (standart deniz seviyesi basıncı 1013.25 hPa'dır). Bu basitleştirilmiş hesaplamada kullanılmaz.

inputs.label: Altitude
inputs.businessContext: Elevation above sea level. Not used in this simplified calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Elevation above sea level. Not used in this simplified calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Deniz seviyesinden yükseklik. Bu basitleştirilmiş hesaplamada kullanılmaz.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
